title: cymbidium × shangrilaense
intro: Cymbidium × shangrilaense, also known as Shangrila orchid, is a hybrid orchid species belonging to the Cymbidium genus, characterized by its unique flowers with a distinctive fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and respiratory system support. In herbal preparations, Cymbidium × shangrilaense is often used as an ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its potential to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate headaches. However, more research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
